## Description / Excerpt

A general principle of field-mediated appearance: artifacts are real, attractors are real, and perceived properties emerge between them.

Excerpt:

## 1. Introduction: The Collapse of Intrinsic Appearance We are accustomed to treating the properties of things as intrinsic. Color belongs to objects. Value belongs to goods. Credibility belongs to statements. Identity belongs to people. This intuition is wrong — or, more precis
